reasoning: The refund request is denied based on the internal fraud alert found in the order's Comments History. The customer, Patricia Johnson, has a suspicious history of 9 refunds in 35 days (an 82% refund rate) totaling $1588.19, with previous claims of 'item not received' despite tracking confirmation. Per the internal staff note, this claim should not be processed and must be escalated to Loss Prevention due to high fraud risk.
